scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @ai-voice-leads/web
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @ai-voice-leads/shared && npm run build -w @ai-voice-leads/whatsapp && npm run build -w @ai-voice-leads/db && npm run build -w @ai-voice-leads/notifications && npm run build -w @ai-voice-leads/integrations && npm run build -w @ai-voice-leads/sequences
scripts.db:seed: npx supabase db reset --no-seed && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -f supabase/seed.sql || echo 'Apply supabase/seed.sql via Supabase SQL editor if psql is unavailable'
scripts.db:generate: echo 'Use: npx supabase gen types typescript --local > apps/web/src/types/database.generated.ts'
